title: Add Program test handoff + fast smoke path
summary: 프로그램수정 에이전트가 변경 내용을 Program test 에이전트에 넘길 수 있도록 handoff 파일/룰과 로컬 빠른 스모크(npm run test:smoke:changed)를 추가했습니다. GitHub Pages 대기 없이 수정분만 검증 가능합니다.
testFocus: Handoff files exist and are readable

fastChecks.pattern: Fast smoke for Program test agent

deploy.status: n/a — tooling only; Pages UI not required

asIs: Program test had to scrape coding-agent transcripts / wait on Pages to know what changed.
toBe: Coding agent writes .cursor/handoff/*; Program test runs npm run test:smoke:changed for a fast scoped check.
